creator: johan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi Marco, 
Have you seen this problem in a more recent release of FreeBSD, 
for example 4.1? 

Please let us know if this is still a problem by sending 
mail to 'freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org' with the subject 
of this mail preserved.
